message:
chore(deps): Update Rust dependencies

Remove unused dependency and update Cargo.lock with latest
compatible versions.

- Remove 1 unused crate from Cargo.toml
- Update Cargo.lock (-112 lines of outdated deps)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
